prompt: Set up shipeasy in this repo so I can start shipping feature flags.
note: No setup skill anymore — onboarding must delegate to the `shipeasy setup` CLI, not start creating resources. Bash is disallowed in the sandbox, so the agent can only recommend running it (text assertion).

prompt: I've never used shipeasy. How do I install it and wire it into my Next.js app?
note: First-time install → point at the one-command CLI installer.

prompt: How do I get started with shipeasy in this project?
note: Open-ended getting-started → the CLI is the entry point.

prompt: Set up shipeasy error reporting with see() in this project from scratch.
note: ASPIRATIONAL: "set up error reporting" from scratch is an install step the `shipeasy setup` CLI owns (offers the error module + devtools). Observed: often routes to `shipeasy-see` (the see() error-handling skill) instead of delegating to the CLI — a real routing ambiguity between installing the module and using it. Accept either the setup or install CLI command.

prompt: I want the shipeasy devtools side panel / admin panel in my app. How do I add it?
note: The devtools overlay is offered by the `shipeasy setup` CLI (module + overlay step) — delegate there, don't hand-roll it.

prompt: I want to translate my website using shipeasy i18n. How do I set that up?
note: "Translate the website" should still route to the i18n skill (which owns the setup-i18n flow) after the setup skill's removal. First-time i18n also needs `shipeasy setup` to enable the i18n module — mentioning it is the ideal.

prompt: Set up feature flags for my project.
note: ASPIRATIONAL: a bare "set up feature flags" (no flag named) should NOT create a flag — base setup is already done, so the agent should say so and OFFER to create the first flag. Contrast shipeasy-flags/dedupe-existing-gate, which names a flag and does create.

prompt: Set up A/B experiments for my project.
note: ASPIRATIONAL: bare "set up experiments" → don't create one; report setup done and offer to create the first experiment.

prompt: Set up metrics for my project.
note: ASPIRATIONAL: bare "set up metrics" → don't create one; report setup done and offer to create the first metric.

prompt: Set up alerting for my project.
note: ASPIRATIONAL: bare "set up alerting" → don't create an alert rule; report setup done and offer to create the first alert.
